description: A reader should fail sync when the seed replaces advertised heads and then requests a snapshot that was only reachable from the withdrawn root set.

assertions.description: Reader rejects WANT because replace=true withdrew the old sync roots before the stale snapshot object was requested again.
Reader does not keep writing sync state after the withdrawn-root snapshot WANT violation.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with a post-HELLO root-set replacement fault on the snapshot-assisted optional-message path.
The harness keeps the normal snapshot-capable peer-store transcript but injects a replacing HEADS plus a stale snapshot WANT before BYE.
